11.response: {"Q0":"Probably more than one thing, but I guess the ability to focus on different circumstances."}

13.response: {"Q0":"It was a fun concept, but it became boring really quick."}

0.response: {"Q0":"Say out loud \"arriba\" or \"abajo\" to remember which galaxy to pick when I started to get bored."}

7.response: {"Q0":"It improved my motivation because I thought it meant you guys expected me to fail."}

9.response: {"Q0":"More focused on galaxies, planets became automatic really fast, in galaxies I still needed to think."}

8.response: {"Q0":"Better odds, and if the odds were similar, money."}
